infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: T2W uses your location while you are in an active group ride so other riders and the lead/sweep crew can see the group's position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: T2W uses your location in the background only while you are in an active group ride. Tracking stops automatically when the ride ends or when you leave the live session.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: T2W uses your location in the background only while you are in an active group ride. Tracking stops automatically when the ride ends.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: T2W uses the camera to upload payment proof during ride registration and to share photos from your rides.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: T2W uses your photo library to upload ride posters, blog covers, profile pictures, and ride post photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: T2W uses your location in the background only while you are in an active group ride.
